signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), missing forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

This March figure, reported by Trading Economics, marks a slight uptick but remains near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid global energy volatility from the Iran conflict; it aligns with the BOK's April 10 decision to hold rates at 2.5% for the 7th month, citing oil
